overall.description: A hooded player character stands on a rocky cliff edge in a video game, overlooking a vast mountainous landscape with a snow-capped peak and alpine lake during a dramatic golden hour sunset. The scene features cinematic volumetric lighting, dynamic cloud formations, and atmospheric depth typical of high-end game engines.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain overlook with panoramic vista of snow-capped peak and alpine lake

events.description: flock of birds flies across the sky from left to right above the mountain peak

agents.ego_description: hooded figure stands motionless on cliff edge, occasionally shifting weight and adjusting stance while gazing at the distant mountain landscape

entered.detail: tall snow-covered peak dominating the horizon with golden sunlight illuminating its upper slopes
calm reflective water body nestled in the valley between mountain ridges
dense green tree cover filling the valley below the cliff
stone outcrop where the character stands, providing an elevated vantage point
vertical wooden beam or marker on the left side of the frame

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a rocky precipice overlooking a breathtaking mountain vista during golden hour. A snow-capped peak rises in the distance above a forested valley and tranquil lake, while dramatic clouds drift across the warm-lit sky. Birds occasionally fly across the frame as the character remains in place, absorbing the panoramic view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady, cinematic gaze from a rocky precipice that emphasizes the vast scale of a mountainous wilderness during the golden hour. It begins with the hooded character standing still on the cliff's edge, overlooking a deep forested valley and a tranquil alpine lake. As the camera lingers on the panoramic vista, the warm light of the sunset intensifies, casting a golden glow across the landscape. The scene then expands toward the horizon where a massive snow-capped peak rises against a sky filled with drifting, dramatic clouds. Finally, the stillness of the moment is punctuated by birds gliding across the frame, adding a sense of life to the atmospheric depth of the mountains.
